Patch Set 3:

Is this maven release necessary or just the container release is sufficient?

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> Is this maven release necessary or just the container release is sufficient?

maven release is necessary if underlying jar is used by other components. If only used by son-handler container, then mvn release can be skipped

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

autorelease-314045 is too old.. this build being released is closed to 1 month old and we only keep 
builds for 20 days... please use a newer candidate.

Patch Set 3:
